mapper.sql: id, category_name, parent_id, level, sort, icon, status, is_show, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM product_category WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM product_category WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT FROM product_category WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_category (category_name, parent_id, level, sort, icon, status, is_show, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{parentId}, #{level}, #{sort}, #{icon}, #{status}, #{isShow}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_category SET category_name=#{categoryName}, parent_id=#{parentId}, level=#{level}, sort=#{sort}, icon=#{icon}, status=#{status}, is_show=#{isShow}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE product_category SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product_category SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
